title: ruehssia fusca
intro: Ruehssia fusca, also known as the Himalayan Rue or Himalayan Ruehssia, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Ruehssia fusca can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
